size_t/string size cast to uint32_t. Verify the value is bounded before serialization so large inputs cannot truncate length fields.

Pointer arithmetic with sizeof(). This is correct only when the pointer element type is byte-sized or when the expression is size arithmetic. Prefer hasBytes(), std::next(), or an explicitly byte-oriented helper for serialization/deserialization code.
